title: More Coaster Compat
description: More coaster compat for Brewin' and Chewin' & Abnormals Mods
body:
**Coaster Compat for:**

- Endergetic: Bolloom Fruit
- Environmental: Truffle, Plum
- Buzzier Bees: Honeyed Apple
- Atmospheric: Dragonfruit & Variants, Candied Orange Slices
- Neapolitan: Banana, Banana Bunch
- Haunted Harvest: Corn
- Cultural Delights: Avocado, Cucumber & Eggplant
